---
title: "nitrix.signal.fourier"
generated: true
signature-hash: f744c6620a572b34
description: "Spectral / analytic-signal utilities."
listing:
  id: nitrix-signal-fourier-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-signal-fourier/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.signal.fourier`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Spectral / analytic-signal utilities.

The bread-and-butter primitives for working with bandpass /
analytic-signal representations of time series:

- [`product_filter`](nitrix-signal-fourier/product_filter.qmd) / [`product_filtfilt`](nitrix-signal-fourier/product_filtfilt.qmd) --
  frequency-domain convolution via `rfft` multiplication.
  Forward and zero-phase forward-backward variants.
- [`analytic_signal`](nitrix-signal-fourier/analytic_signal.qmd) -- compute the complex analytic signal
  $x + i\,\operatorname{Hilbert}(x)$ whose real part is
  $x$ and whose imaginary part is the Hilbert transform of
  $x$.
- [`hilbert_transform`](nitrix-signal-fourier/hilbert_transform.qmd) -- the imaginary part of the analytic
  signal.
- [`envelope`](nitrix-signal-fourier/envelope.qmd) -- magnitude of the analytic signal.
- [`instantaneous_phase`](nitrix-signal-fourier/instantaneous_phase.qmd) / [`instantaneous_frequency`](nitrix-signal-fourier/instantaneous_frequency.qmd)
  -- unwrapped phase and its time derivative.
- [`env_inst`](nitrix-signal-fourier/env_inst.qmd) -- compute envelope, frequency, and phase from
  one [`analytic_signal`](nitrix-signal-fourier/analytic_signal.qmd) call.

All functions are reverse-mode differentiable and JIT-friendly.
The Hilbert mask construction is vectorised; the FFT shape comes
from `axis` and (optionally) an explicit `n`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `obs` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `obs_freq` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-signal-fourier-symbols}
:::
